name: Brigitte's Shrimp or Tuna Mousse
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Shrimp or 2 small cans Tuna
1 package Unflavored Gelatin in Water as directed
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak gelatin in water.
2. Heat undiluted tomato soup; add gelatin and stir well until dissolved.
3. Mash cream cheese and add to the soup, continuing to heat until cheese is dissolved.
4. Cool mixture.
5. Fold in mayonnaise, shrimp or tuna, and vegetables and seasonings.
6. Mix well and pour into a well-oiled mold.
7. Enjoy!
